name: codebase-impact runs a candidate detector across the working tree and lists matched files
setup: mkdir -p tree && printf 'console.log("x")\n' > tree/a.js && printf 'const x = 1\n' > tree/b.js

printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: no-console
    name: no-console
    description: disallow console.log
    detector: bash -c "grep -l console.log"
' > rule.yaml
